name: The Making of Sabha: A Conversation on Restoration and Reimagination - With Bijoy Ramachandran
description: Architect Bijoy Ramachandran speaks about the restoration of the 150-year-old Sabha building on Kamraj Road, and the ideas, challenges, and decisions involved in transforming a historic structure into a contemporary cultural space. The talk will trace the process of working with an existing building, the role of craft and material, and the question of how architecture can hold both memory and new life.

name: Zara Sa Yaad Rakhna Hai  - An evening of ghazals that refuses to hurry
Oota & Aata: Edition 4 - Pause, Gather, and Play Like We Used To
Saree Sakhiyaan's Earth Day Edit - A Conscious Celebration of Craft and Community
description: In a time where mindful living is becoming less of a choice and more of a necessity, Earth Day Edit arrives in Bengaluru as a thoughtfully imagined ode to conscious consumption. Curated by the community-led collective Saree Sakhiyaan, this one-day showcase brings together a refined mix of brands rooted in sustainability, craftsmanship, and intentional design. Set against the warm, inviting backdrop of Sabha BLR, the edit will feature an eclectic curation—handwoven sarees, contemporary fashion, artisanal jewellery, home décor, and clean personal care—each carrying stories of heritage, innovation, and responsibility. More than a marketplace, Earth Day Edit is envisioned as a space for connection and conversation. It invites a growing community of mindful consumers to engage with creators who are redefining luxury through authenticity, ethics, and enduring style. Among the many thoughtful elements at Earth Day Edit is a specially curated preloved saree sale, extending the conversation on sustainability within the saree ecosystem—encouraging circulation, reuse, and renewed appreciation for heirloom textiles. The showcase will also host a series of intimate workshops, ranging from explorations of sustainable crafts to contemporary saree styling. Designed as interactive experiences, these sessions invite attendees to engage more deeply with the stories, skills, and evolving narratives around conscious fashion. For collaborations, press inquiries, and participation, please contact: Aarti Kripps Kapoor  Founder – Saree Sakhiyaan  +91 9920951145
